news.title:
Astra Microwave, Solar Industries, and Zen Technologies benefit from India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence approvals.
Astra leads in radar/missile systems, Solar excels in artillery/missiles, and Zen drives UAV/anti-drone tech growth.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave, Solar Industries, and Zen Technologies benefit from India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence approvals.
Astra leads in radar/missile systems, Solar excels in artillery/missiles, and Zen drives UAV/anti-drone tech growth.

news.title:
Vaishali Parekh recommends Maharashtra Seamless, Sagility, and Zen Technologies for intraday trading amid global market volatility.
Nifty 50 needs to cross 23,800 and Bank Nifty 55,500 for positive sentiment; crude prices and FIIs weigh on markets.
news.summary:
Vaishali Parekh recommends Maharashtra Seamless, Sagility, and Zen Technologies for intraday trading amid global market volatility.
Nifty 50 needs to cross 23,800 and Bank Nifty 55,500 for positive sentiment; crude prices and FIIs weigh on markets.

news.title: Zen Technologies Ltd demonstrates strong revenue visibility.
news.summary: Zen Technologies Ltd demonstrates strong revenue visibility.

news.title:
Defence stocks face selling pressure despite strong order books and govt support; Nifty India Defence Index down 1.8%.
Short-term concerns include profit booking, supply chain issues, execution focus, but long-term prospects remain positive.
news.summary:
Defence stocks face selling pressure despite strong order books and govt support; Nifty India Defence Index down 1.8%.
Short-term concerns include profit booking, supply chain issues, execution focus, but long-term prospects remain positive.

news.title:
Zen Technologies leads in defence simulators, anti-drone systems, scaling revenues globally.
Hyderabad facility replicates combat with AK-47s, tanks, showcasing IP-led growth for SMEs.
news.summary:
Zen Technologies leads in defence simulators, anti-drone systems, scaling revenues globally.
Hyderabad facility replicates combat with AK-47s, tanks, showcasing IP-led growth for SMEs.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal retains Neutral rating on Zen Tech with ₹1,400 target.
Global defense spending aids exports; supply issues may delay execution.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal retains Neutral rating on Zen Tech with ₹1,400 target.
Global defense spending aids exports; supply issues may delay execution.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund disclosed acquisition details of Zen Technologies shares under SEBI Reg. 29(1).
After acquisition, Motilal Oswal holds 5.0316% voting rights, up from 4.9703%, through market transactions.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund disclosed acquisition details of Zen Technologies shares under SEBI Reg. 29(1).
After acquisition, Motilal Oswal holds 5.0316% voting rights, up from 4.9703%, through market transactions.

news.title:
Zen Technologies Ltd received the highest Dun & Bradstreet rating of 5A1, indicating strong financial strength and creditworthiness.
The rating boosts Zen's credibility for global defence partnerships, backed by a ₹1,400+ crore order book and over 200 patents.
news.summary:
Zen Technologies Ltd received the highest Dun & Bradstreet rating of 5A1, indicating strong financial strength and creditworthiness.
The rating boosts Zen's credibility for global defence partnerships, backed by a ₹1,400+ crore order book and over 200 patents.

news.title:
Zen Technologies to participate in Anand Rathi's Sashakt Bharat Aerospace & Defense Conference on Feb 17, 2026.
Event in Mumbai involves 1-1 and group meetings from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM IST.
news.summary:
Zen Technologies to participate in Anand Rathi's Sashakt Bharat Aerospace & Defense Conference on Feb 17, 2026.
Event in Mumbai involves 1-1 and group meetings from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM IST.

news.title:
Zen Technologies missed revenue estimates by 15%, reporting 1.8b, with statutory losses per share aligning at 32.07.
Analysts forecast reduced 2027 revenue of 12.9b (+55%) and EPS of 40.83, while maintaining price target at 1,654.
news.summary:
Zen Technologies missed revenue estimates by 15%, reporting 1.8b, with statutory losses per share aligning at 32.07.
Analysts forecast reduced 2027 revenue of 12.9b (+55%) and EPS of 40.83, while maintaining price target at 1,654.

news.title: Zen Technologies forecasts Rs 4,000 crore revenue by FY27-28, leveraging export growth.
news.summary: Zen Technologies forecasts Rs 4,000 crore revenue by FY27-28, leveraging export growth.

news.title:
Zen Technologies informed about the recording of its earnings call held on Feb 2, 2026.
The call discussed Q3 and nine-month financial results ending Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Zen Technologies informed about the recording of its earnings call held on Feb 2, 2026.
The call discussed Q3 and nine-month financial results ending Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
ZEN Technologies Q3 standalone revenue at ₹116.15 cr, PAT ₹47.82 cr.
Consolidated Q3 revenue ₹177.82 cr, PAT ₹54.77 cr; ₹931 cr orders to boost FY27.
news.summary:
ZEN Technologies Q3 standalone revenue at ₹116.15 cr, PAT ₹47.82 cr.
Consolidated Q3 revenue ₹177.82 cr, PAT ₹54.77 cr; ₹931 cr orders to boost FY27.

news.title:
ZEN Technologies faces revenue impact from procurement delays in May 2025.
Strong order inflows of ₹931 cr over 4 months; FY27 execution boosts visibility.
news.summary:
ZEN Technologies faces revenue impact from procurement delays in May 2025.
Strong order inflows of ₹931 cr over 4 months; FY27 execution boosts visibility.

news.title:
Zen Technologies' Q3 EBITDA rose to 668M INR from 441M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 37.6% from 29% in the same period.
news.summary:
Zen Technologies' Q3 EBITDA rose to 668M INR from 441M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 37.6% from 29% in the same period.

news.title:
ZEN Technologies approved Q3 and 9M unaudited results for Dec 2025. Standalone orders: Rs. 888.7 Cr, consolidated: Rs. 1082.8 Cr.
Re-appointment of Chairman and JMD for 3 years approved. New CFO starts from Jan 31, 2026.
news.summary:
ZEN Technologies approved Q3 and 9M unaudited results for Dec 2025. Standalone orders: Rs. 888.7 Cr, consolidated: Rs. 1082.8 Cr.
Re-appointment of Chairman and JMD for 3 years approved. New CFO starts from Jan 31, 2026.

news.title:
Sun Pharma, GAIL India, IDFC First Bank, Birla Corporation, and others to announce Q3 results today, 31st Jan.
Companies like Bharat Dynamics, Delhivery, and Zen Technologies are also set to release Q3 financials.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma, GAIL India, IDFC First Bank, Birla Corporation, and others to announce Q3 results today, 31st Jan.
Companies like Bharat Dynamics, Delhivery, and Zen Technologies are also set to release Q3 financials.

news.title:
Budget 2026 may boost defence capex by 20%, benefiting stocks like BEL, Mazagon Dock, HAL, and BDL.
Focus areas include UAVs, missiles, and shipbuilding; Rs 10,000 crore Drone Shakti Mission and Sagarmala 2.0 to drive growth.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 may boost defence capex by 20%, benefiting stocks like BEL, Mazagon Dock, HAL, and BDL.
Focus areas include UAVs, missiles, and shipbuilding; Rs 10,000 crore Drone Shakti Mission and Sagarmala 2.0 to drive growth.

news.title:
Major firms like L&T, Zen Tech, and Kernex secured Rs 10,000+ crore orders across railways, defence, and real estate.
Zen Tech surged 8% post anti-drone order; Kernex stock rose 7% on Rs 2,465 crore Kavach Loco deal.
news.summary:
Major firms like L&T, Zen Tech, and Kernex secured Rs 10,000+ crore orders across railways, defence, and real estate.
Zen Tech surged 8% post anti-drone order; Kernex stock rose 7% on Rs 2,465 crore Kavach Loco deal.

news.title:
ZEN Technologies secures Rs. 332 Cr order for anti-drone systems.
It also received Rs. 72 Cr order for training simulators, to execute in 1 year.
news.summary:
ZEN Technologies secures Rs. 332 Cr order for anti-drone systems.
It also received Rs. 72 Cr order for training simulators, to execute in 1 year.
